caption: A man with blond hair, glasses, and a navy blue t-shirt wears white headphones and speaks into a black microphone in a room with light-colored wood-paneled walls. To his left, a decorated Christmas tree with colorful lights is visible, and behind him is a framed picture containing the number "20". The video frames feature an on-screen gaming interface. The top frames display the text "SUBSTITUTION" in the upper left, while the bottom frames show "LINEUP". Both rows include a top banner with numbers such as "173,034", "0", "14,600", "2,193,944", "LVL 19", and "91". The bottom frames also include a menu bar with options like "OFFENSE", "DEFENSE", "SPECIAL TEAMS", "SPECIALISTS", "STRATEGY", and "VISUALS". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a smile to an open-mouthed, surprised expression.
